ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has secured a significant international contract from the Central Housing and Planning Authority, Guyana, for a four-lane highway construction project valued at $35.42 million USD, to be completed within 20 months. This new order represents a material positive impact, expanding the company's international footprint and bolstering its revenue pipeline and order book. No immediate red flags are identified in this standard disclosure of a project win.
